Title: Login and open App Launcher
Action: Log in to Salesforce with the provided user
Expected Result: User lands on the Lightning home page

Title: Login and open App Launcher
Action: Click the App Launcher (waffle icon at top left)
Expected Result: The App Launcher panel opens

Title: Login and open App Launcher
Action: Type "Sales" in the App Launcher search box
Expected Result: The Sales app appears in the results

Title: Login and open App Launcher
Action: Press Escape to close the App Launcher
Expected Result: The panel closes and focus returns to the home page

Title: Create a Contact
Action: From the App Launcher open the Contacts tab
Expected Result: The Contacts list view is shown

Title: Create a Contact
Action: Click the New button to open the Contact creation form
Expected Result: A creation form titled "New Contact" appears

Title: Create a Contact
Action: Fill in First Name and Last Name
Expected Result: The fields accept the values without validation errors

Title: Create a Contact
Action: Click Save
Expected Result: The form closes and the newly created Contact detail page is shown with the name "Test UAT Runner"

Title: Create a Contact
Action: Verify the Contact appears on its detail page
Expected Result: The page title contains "Test UAT Runner"

Title: View Custom Metadata Types in Setup
Action: Open the Setup workspace from the gear icon at the top right
Expected Result: The Setup workspace opens

Title: View Custom Metadata Types in Setup
Action: Type "Custom Metadata Types" in the Quick Find box
Expected Result: An entry labelled "Custom Metadata Types" appears under Custom Code in Quick Find

Title: View Custom Metadata Types in Setup
Action: Click the Custom Metadata Types entry in Quick Find
Expected Result: The Custom Metadata Types setup page opens

Title: View Custom Metadata Types in Setup
Action: Verify the page shows the Custom Metadata Types list
Expected Result: The heading "Custom Metadata Types" is visible and either a list of types or the standard empty-state message is shown

Title: Create a Lead
Action: From the App Launcher open the Leads tab
Expected Result: The Leads list view is shown

Title: Create a Lead
Action: Click the New button to open the Lead creation form
Expected Result: A creation form titled "New Lead" appears

Title: Create a Lead
Action: Fill in Last Name and Company
Data: Last Name=Smoke Test, Company=UAT Runner Inc
Expected Result: The fields accept the values without validation errors

Title: Create a Lead
Action: Click Save
Expected Result: The form closes and the newly created Lead detail page is shown

Title: Create a Lead
Action: Verify the Lead appears on its detail page
Expected Result: The page title contains "Smoke Test"

Title: Search for a record via global search
Action: Click the global Search box at the top of the Lightning header
Expected Result: The search box receives focus and a dropdown with recent items may appear

Title: Search for a record via global search
Action: Type "Acme" in the global search box
Expected Result: Search suggestions containing "Acme" are displayed in the dropdown

Title: Search for a record via global search
Action: Press Enter to execute the search
Expected Result: The full search results page opens and lists any records or sections matching "Acme"
